ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographical_entities" (
  "fips" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographical entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical entity */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical entity (e.g., World, Sub-Region, Country) */,
  "data" REAL /* Statistical data associated with the geographical entity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the entity */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the entity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the entity */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the entity */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the entity */,
  "parent_fips" TEXT /* FIPS code of the parent entity (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_entities_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES entity_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_entities_parent_fips FOREIGN KEY ("parent_fips") REFERENCES geographical_entities ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical data entry */,
  "fips" TEXT /* Reference to the geographical entity */,
  "time_frame" INTEGER /* Time frame for which the data is collected */,
  "statistic" REAL /* The actual statistic collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., UNESCO, World Bank) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., 0.95 for 95% confidence) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_data_time_frame FOREIGN KEY ("time_frame") REFERENCES time_frames ("time_frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_data_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES geographical_entities ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity type */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level in the geographical hierarchy (e.g., 1 for World, 2 for Sub-Region, 3 for Country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_frames" (
  "time_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time frame */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time frame */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time frame */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time frame */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES statistical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., statistician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES statistical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XLSX) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES statistical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES statistical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage, dollars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES statistical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_fips" TEXT /* FIPS code of the parent entity */,
  "child_fips" TEXT /* FIPS code of the child entity */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., part_of, located_in) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength or weight of the relationship (e.g., 1.0 for direct, 0.5 for indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_parent_fips FOREIGN KEY ("parent_fips") REFERENCES geographical_entities ("fips"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_child_fips FOREIGN KEY ("child_fips") REFERENCES geographical_entities ("fips")
)
